meaning: 1. to multiply; 2. to reproduce; 3. to increase gradually in number or
sentence: 这种鱼在这片水域繁衍得很快。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng yú zài zhè piàn shuǐyù fányǎn de hěn kuài.
english: This type of fish multiplies very quickly in this body of water.

meaning: 1. to sweep the floor; 2. to reach rock bottom; 3. to be at an all-tim
sentence: 他每天早上起来第一件事就是扫地。
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang qǐlái dì yī jiàn shì jiùshì sǎodì.
english: The first thing he does every morning after getting up is sweep the floor.

sentence: 法律应当严厉惩治食品造假行为。
pinyin: Fǎlǜ yīngdāng yánlì chéngzhì shípǐn zàojiǎ xíngwéi.
english: The law should harshly punish food adulteration.

sentence: 这种家具表面涂了一层树脂保护漆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jiājù biǎomiàn tú le yī céng shùzhī bǎohù qī.
english: The surface of this furniture is coated with a layer of protective resin varnish.

sentence: 这本书用白话写成，老少都能读懂。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū yòng báihuà xiě chéng, lǎoshào dōu néng dú dǒng.
english: This book is written in vernacular language, so both young and old can understand it.

sentence: 他出身低微，却凭努力改变了命运。
pinyin: Tā chūshēn dīwēi, què píng nǔlì gǎibiànle mìngyùn.
english: He came from a humble background but changed his fate through hard work.

sentence: 这款果汁不含任何人工色素。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn guǒzhī bù hán rènhé réngōng sèsù.
english: This fruit juice contains no artificial pigments.

sentence: 他们在市郊买了一套带小院的房子。
pinyin: Tāmen zài shìjiāo mǎile yī tào dài xiǎoyuàn de fángzi.
english: They bought a house with a small courtyard in the suburbs.

sentence: 我用优惠券买到了半价的咖啡。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng yōuhuìquàn mǎidào le bànjià de kāfēi.
english: I used a coupon to buy coffee at half price.

meaning: 1. to be put in charge of; 2. to be responsible for; 3. branched passa
sentence: 她分管公司的人事和行政工作。
pinyin: Tā fēnguǎn gōngsī de rénshì hé xíngzhèng gōngzuò.
english: She is responsible for the company's HR and administrative affairs.

sentence: 这项政策深得万民拥护。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng zhèngcè shēn dé wànmín yōnghù.
english: This policy enjoys the strong support of all the people.

sentence: 她在大学选修了生物化学课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiū le shēngwù huàxué kèchéng.
english: She took a biochemistry course as an elective at university.

sentence: 他积极参与了这次竞选活动。
pinyin: Tā jījí cānyù le zhè cì jìngxuǎn huódòng.
english: He actively participated in this election campaign.

meaning: 1. (literary) to decline; 2. to wane; 3. title of a section in the Boo
sentence: 传统手工艺如今已渐渐式微。
pinyin: Chuántǒng shǒugōngyì rújīn yǐ jiànjiàn shìwēi.
english: Traditional handicrafts have been gradually declining these days.

meaning: 1. to conclude a case; 2. to wind up
sentence: 警方在收集到足够证据后正式结案。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng zài shōují dào zúgòu zhèngjù hòu zhèngshì jiéàn.
english: The police officially closed the case after gathering sufficient evidence.

sentence: 她打字很快，一分钟能打八十个字。
pinyin: Tā dǎzì hěn kuài, yī fēnzhōng néng dǎ bāshí gè zì.
english: She types very fast — she can type eighty characters per minute.

meaning: soldier; large army; powerful army; (old) large-scale war
sentence: 营地里的大兵们正在训练。
pinyin: Yíngdì lǐ de dà bīng men zhèngzài xùnliàn.
english: The soldiers at the camp are training.

sentence: 这个地区近年来识字率有明显提高。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū jìnnián lái shí zì lǜ yǒu míngxiǎn tígāo.
english: The literacy rate in this area has improved noticeably in recent years.

sentence: 将军亲自前往前线受降。
pinyin: Jiāngjūn qīnzì qiánwǎng qiánxiàn shòu xiáng.
english: The general went to the front line in person to accept the surrender.

sentence: 黑洞中心存在一个奇点，物理定律在那里失效。
pinyin: Hēidòng zhōngxīn cúnzài yīgè qí diǎn, wùlǐ dìnglǜ zài nàlǐ shīxiào.
english: At the center of a black hole there is a singularity where the laws of physics break down.

sentence: 这个望远镜的倍率是二十倍。
pinyin: Zhège wàngyuǎnjìng de bèi lǜ shì èrshí bèi.
english: This telescope has a magnifying power of twenty times.

sentence: 图书馆里有一本鲁迅的年谱，记录了他的一生。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ yǒu yī běn Lǔ Xùn de nián pǔ, jìlù le tā de yīshēng.
english: The library has a chronicle of Lu Xun's life, documenting his entire life story.

sentence: 那段时期出现了大规模的反日运动。
pinyin: Nà duàn shíqī chūxiàn le dàguīmó de fǎn rì yùndòng.
english: During that period, large-scale anti-Japan movements emerged.

sentence: 农场今年种植了大片油料作物。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng jīnnián zhòngzhí le dà piàn yóu liào zuòwù.
english: The farm planted a large area of oilseed crops this year.

meaning: merchandise sold for Chinese New Year
sentence: 春节前一周，大家都忙着采购年货。
pinyin: Chūnjié qián yī zhōu, dàjiā dōu máng zhe cǎigòu nián huò.
english: In the week before Spring Festival, everyone is busy buying New Year goods.

sentence: 两边竞争，最终是消费者得利。
pinyin: Liǎng biān jìngzhēng, zuìzhōng shì xiāofèizhě dé lì.
english: When the two sides compete, it's ultimately the consumers who benefit.

meaning: to control onself; to exercise self-restraint; self-sustaining
sentence: 面对美食的诱惑，他努力自持，没有多吃。
pinyin: Miànduì měishí de yòuhuò, tā nǔlì zì chí, méiyǒu duō chī.
english: Faced with the temptation of delicious food, he exercised self-restraint and didn't overeat.

sentence: 进入公司大楼需要出示工作证。
pinyin: Jìnrù gōngsī dàlóu xūyào chūshì gōng zuò zhèng.
english: You need to show your employee ID card to enter the company building.

meaning: meat that has been cured and air-dried in the cold (esp. during the 12
sentence: 妈妈每年冬天都会自己腌腊肉。
pinyin: Māma měinián dōngtiān dōu huì zìjǐ yān là ròu.
english: Every winter, mom cures her own air-dried pork.

sentence: 最近电价上涨了不少，电费账单高了很多。
pinyin: Zuìjìn diànjià shàngzhǎng le bùshǎo, diànfèi zhàngdān gāo le hěn duō.
english: Electricity prices have risen a lot recently, and the electric bill is much higher.

sentence: 这场自行车比赛第三赛段的路况非常复杂。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng zìxíngchē bǐsài dì sān sàiduàn de lùkuàng fēicháng fùzá.
english: The road conditions in the third stage of this cycling race are very complex.

meaning: to restructure; to reorganize; to revamp
sentence: 公司决定重整内部结构，提高工作效率。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng zhòngzhěng nèibù jiégòu, tígāo gōngzuò xiàolǜ.
english: The company decided to restructure its internal organization to improve efficiency.

sentence: 总统乘坐专机前往参加峰会。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng chéngzuò zhuānjī qiánwǎng cānjiā fēnghuì.
english: The president flew on a dedicated aircraft to attend the summit.

sentence: 他在推特上认识了很多推友，经常互动。
pinyin: Tā zài Tuītè shàng rènshi le hěn duō tuīyǒu, jīngcháng hùdòng.
english: He has made many Twitter friends online and they interact frequently.

meaning: blog article; to write a blog article (netspeak)
sentence: 她写了一篇博文，分享了自己的旅行经历。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī piān bówén, fēnxiǎng le zìjǐ de lǚxíng jīnglì.
english: She wrote a blog post sharing her travel experiences.

meaning: to change the laws; political reform; unconventional method
sentence: 晚清的变法运动试图推动政治改革。
pinyin: Wǎn Qīng de biànfǎ yùndòng shìtú tuīdòng zhèngzhì gǎigé.
english: The late Qing reform movement attempted to push forward political change.

sentence: 她从小学声乐，现在是一名专业歌手。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo xué shēngyuè, xiànzài shì yī míng zhuānyè gēshǒu.
english: She studied vocal music from a young age and is now a professional singer.

sentence: 他是被领养的，但他的亲妈从未放弃寻找他。
pinyin: Tā shì bèi lǐngyǎng de, dàn tā de qīnmā cóng wèi fàngqì xúnzhǎo tā.
english: He was adopted, but his biological mother never gave up searching for him.

sentence: 他善于操弄舆论，让人们相信自己的观点。
pinyin: Tā shànyú cāonòng yúlùn, ràng rénmen xiāngxìn zìjǐ de guāndiǎn.
english: He is skilled at manipulating public opinion to make people believe his views.

meaning: to begin; to set in motion
sentence: 村里决定兴办一所小学，方便孩子们上学。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ juédìng xīngbàn yī suǒ xiǎoxué, fāngbiàn háizimen shàngxué.
english: The village decided to set up a primary school to make it easier for children to attend.

meaning: to set aside; to make provision for (capital requirements)
sentence: 银行需要计提足够的坏账准备金。
pinyin: Yínháng xūyào jìtí zúgòu de huàizhàng zhǔnbèijīn.
english: Banks need to set aside sufficient provisions for bad debts.

sentence: 那位影星出现在机场，引来很多粉丝。
pinyin: Nà wèi yǐngxīng chūxiàn zài jīchǎng, yǐn lái hěn duō fěnsī.
english: That film star appeared at the airport, drawing a lot of fans.

meaning: 1. mistaken ideas; 2. misconceptions; 3. the error of one's ways
sentence: 很多人对减肥有一个常见的误区。
pinyin: Hěn duō rén duì jiǎnféi yǒu yī gè chángjiàn de wù qū.
english: Many people have a common misconception about losing weight.

sentence: 他总爱吹牛，说自己认识各种大人物。
pinyin: Tā zǒng ài chuīniú, shuō zìjǐ rènshi gèzhǒng dà rénwù.
english: He's always bragging, claiming to know all sorts of important people.

meaning: (idiom) emerge more and more; innumerable succession; breeding like fl
sentence: 网络上的新词汇层出不穷。
pinyin: Wǎngluò shàng de xīn cíhuì céng chū bù qióng.
english: New words keep appearing online in an endless stream.

sentence: 公司的防火墙挡住了很多攻击。
pinyin: Gōngsī de fánghuǒqiáng dǎngzhù le hěn duō gōngjī.
english: The company's firewall blocked many attacks.

sentence: 签合同的时候要盖公司的印章才有效。
pinyin: Qiān hétong de shíhou yào gài gōngsī de yìnzhāng cái yǒuxiào.
english: When signing a contract, you need to stamp the company seal for it to be valid.

sentence: 她在钢琴大奖赛中获得了第一名。
pinyin: Tā zài gāng qín dà jiǎng sài zhōng huò dé le dì yī míng.
english: She won first place in the piano grand prix.

meaning: relying on; on the basis of
sentence: 他凭着努力考上了大学。
pinyin: Tā píng zhe nǔ lì kǎo shàng le dà xué.
english: He got into university by relying on hard work.

meaning: to lead a team; to lead a group; group leader; (tourism) tour guide
sentence: 老师带队去博物馆参观。
pinyin: Lǎoshī dàiduì qù bówùguǎn cānguān.
english: The teacher led the group to visit the museum.
